recommendations.title: Detective Conan: Dimensional Sniper

recommendations.title: Detective Conan: Private Eye in the Distant Sea
recommendations.overview: It’s a high-stakes mystery on the high seas! Enjoying a free prize cruise on a military ship, Conan and his friends find their relaxation interrupted by the threat of possible explosives on board! It’s a race against time to find the culprit and save

recommendations.title: Detective Conan: The Eleventh Striker
recommendations.overview: Kogoro's detective agency receives a mysterious phone call. Someone on the other end warns about a bomb and leaves behind a code, which if Conan can decipher the riddle, he can stop the bomb. An adventure begins for Conan and the Detective Boys, taki

recommendations.title: Detective Conan: Quarter of Silence
recommendations.overview: The explosion of a new Tokyo Subway line leads Conan and his friends in a snow-clad village. Here, after eight years, the little detective sheds light on the dynamics behind the shocking event that caused the death of a woman and the coma of a 15-yea

recommendations.title: Case Closed: The Crimson Love Letter
recommendations.overview: Bombing case at Nichiuri TV in autumn. The Satsuki Cup, which crowns the winner of Japan's Hyakunin Isshu, is currently being filmed inside the facility. The incident results in a big commotion and, while the building is burning to ashes, the only pe

recommendations.title: Detective Conan: The Darkest Nightmare
recommendations.overview: On a dark night, the Japanese police is raided by a spy. Different countries' intelligence agencies - such as England's MI6, Germany's BDN, and America's CIA - as well as the FBI's secret files are going to be taken, but public safety officers lead b

recommendations.title: Godzilla: Planet of the Monsters
recommendations.overview: A desperate group of refugees attempts to recolonize Earth 20,000 years after Godzilla took over. But one young man wants revenge above all else.

recommendations.title: Godzilla: City on the Edge of Battle
recommendations.overview: Humanity's desperate battle to reclaim the Earth from Godzilla continues. The key to defeating the King of the Monsters may be Mechagodzilla, a robotic weapon thought to have been lost nearly 20,000 years ago.

recommendations.title: Godzilla: The Planet Eater
recommendations.overview: With no means for defeating Godzilla Earth, mankind watches as King Ghidorah, clad in a golden light, descends on the planet. The heavens and earth shake once again as the war moves to a higher dimension.

recommendations.title: Snatch
recommendations.overview: Unscrupulous boxing promoters, violent bookies, a Russian gangster, incompetent amateur robbers, and supposedly Jewish jewellers fight to track down a priceless stolen diamond.
